title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective marking 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol at Go in 2016. The video reflects on AlphaGo as a foundational moment that sparked the modern AI revolution, leading to subsequent advances in algorithmic discovery and scientific applications like protein folding.
